reviews.review_text: We had such a lovely stay at this cabin park! The cabins were spotless, cosy and had everything we needed for a comfortable getaway. The grounds were well maintained, peaceful and perfect for families. The staff were incredibly friendly and helpful from check-in to check-out and made us feel really welcome. The kids had an amazing time and didn’t want to leave! The location was great and close to everything we needed while still feeling relaxing and quiet. We’ll definitely be coming back and highly recommend staying here to anyone looking for a relaxing holiday. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Well maintained park & good sites. Only down side was the camp kitchen shuts so early.  Dog friendly
Quiet, great place to stay, residents friendly. Gardens look amazing, well kept.

The cabin we stayed in was decent but had everything we needed, the staff are amazing and so great at making you feel comfortable. I had trouble getting through one of the gates but Nicole helped me out and she was awesome! Perfect spot next to the highway to go straight home from the caravan park. I will be staying here every time for sure!!

Recently booked a cabin for my family and was extremely disappointed with the unsatisfactory condition of the property. The condition was run down with ripped flooring and furnishings and mouldy roller blinds. The beds were uncomfortable and the bathroom had an icky feeling. Walls were heavily marked and the entire place needed a deep clean. The location is terrible and to top it off there was a lingering pungent smell from the nearby sewerage plant.
We have been coming here for the last 4 years, always great customer service. Great accommodation and facilities
Large park just north of Adelaide with good pricing and accommodations. Clean and comfortable with most cabins having parking available with metres.
Great experience, facilities good and friendly staff. Family had a great time

Dette var den dyreste campingplads, vi boede på under hele vores tur langs Great Ocean Road, hvor vi i alt besøgte 13 forskellige campingpladser. Derfor tænkte vi, at det nok også måtte være en af de bedre.||Det var desværre langt fra tilfældet.||Pladserne (de såkaldte “Pierres sites”) er meget små, og der lå en ubehagelig lugt af en blanding af bræk og kloak over store dele af området.||Ved poolen var der fyldt med børn, der løb rundt og skreg uden opsyn fra voksne. Samtidig var der kun tre solstole til omkring 18 personer, så det var nærmest umuligt at finde et sted at sidde og slappe af.||Støjen fra vejen kan man ikke rigtig klage over – det havde vi læst om på forhånd og var forberedt på.||WIFI var meget langsom. ||Køkken og toiletter ikke særlig rene. ||Men alt i alt stod oplevelsen slet ikke mål med prisen.||Vi vil klart anbefale andre at finde et andet sted at overnatte, hvis det er muligt.
Clean rooms, family of 3 we stayed in 1 of their old cabins for 14days....excellent customer service, their pool is awsome.  .friendly environment.

Wir waren nur eine Nacht da, weil wir am nächsten Tag unser Wohnmobil bei Apollo abgeben mussten. Unseren Urlaub würden wir hier nicht länger verbringen. Der Stellplatz für unseren Camper war allerdings vollkommen in Ordnung, allerdings mit Schotter. Das Schwimmbad war sauber und ordentlich. Für unseren Zweck war es perfekt.

BEAUTIFUL - It was like being in or own little paradise - Took the kids there for a birthday get away.  Pool was stunning - Cabin was perfect - the entire park was just amazing, just a little oasis.

Loved being there - didn't want to leave - will be going back there for sure.
The staff were amazing - so friendly and the entire process from booking - to checking in and checking out as well as anything we needed in between was amazing.  The park staff were just friend all round.  When it was time for the kids to get out the pool the grounds man came and told the kids but said he would go do everything he needs to do first and come back last so the kids could have a last jump in the pool.

very happy.

It was beautiful. Palm trees everywhere. My favourite and roses. Cabin was really nice and very clean and comfortable. Everyone was really friendly. Like a little community. Pools were beautiful and clean too. Had an amazing time. Thankyou

Had a look around for over 50s lifestyle.
This one is part of a much larger caravan and cabin park. Not really the quiet lifestyle village we were seeking.
We loved this place. Even had a carport which is very rare and nice when loading and unloading when it's raining. Staff were so friendly and helpful. Wish we could have stayed longer.
Beautiful and quiet
WOW  .  Great staff. Very good cabin's. Absolutely love this . Thank you . 😊
Alot of upgrades finally, alot of good things happening. Staff are relatively friendly and park is mostly good. Keep it up

Just spent nearly a month at this caravan park.
We were here from QLD to visit family in palliative care who subsequently passed.
As we were taking things day by day the park staff could not have been more accommodating with extensions to our caravan site booking!
Have nothing but praise for HighwayOne and will def stay again👍

Mikaela was very helpful, friendly and helpful.  Easy access sites,  can stay hooked up.  Clean amenities.  Close to shops,  good access to adelaide via Northern expressway and surrounding areas.
3rd stay this year after touring Victoria.
Caroline and mikaela were so helpful and friendly.  Great site , clean amenities.

Stayed fro 3 nights with our van. Arrived late on Friday and our key was easy to get out of hours. Sites were large and level. Park was overall very clean and tidy. Very easy to get to. Also easy to get into the city as required

My parents stayed, unfortunate weather (🌬️)
But plan to come and stay again... (In a cabin, next time.… 🤭)
A great place to stay, relax and enjoy. Good for a base to drive to other locations as well.

Thank you for a wonderful stay at your pretty, clean and comfortable park. From the lovely reception ladies to Jamie and all friendly staff. Nothing is too much trouble for them. Will certainly recommend this park to my friends.

We stayed overnight on our way through to Darwin in a pet friendly cabin, the staff were very friendly, cabin was clean & comfortable. The location of the Park was so convenient & great price, would definitely stay again

Could not get any other accommodation in town so even though our event was at Mitchell Park  we stayed here. Cabin was lovely had everything you needed except hair-dryer. Was in the older part  and apart from someone riding around on something at 10.30 pm was fine. Never stayed in this caravan park before and was  pleasantly surprised.  Just wish the small bathroom had a hook somewhere so you could hang clothes  but they are not on their own in that department.  Would stay again.
Near stays and not far from some restaurants and shopping places. Wifi pretty much does not exist inside cabins
Super friendly and helpful staff. We arrived late at check in, and then we mixed up our booking date. The park manager Jamie was there straight away to help sort it out.

Have been staying here for many years and have stayed in all areas of the holiday park. Friendly staff and the rooms are very clean and spacious. Great play areas for the kids. 10 out of 10. It's a great place to stay if you don't want to go right into Adelaide.
My favourite place to stay in SA
Very happy with how the park is kept
Great spot out north of Adelaide great rooms and great grounds

Highway 1 has been so accommodating towards me, providing a pet friendly cabin for myself, cat and dog so we have somewhere warm and safe to sleep. The park is huge, it’s beautiful with lots of greenery. Considering you’re next to the expressway, you do not hear much noise at all. Cabin is tidy and clean with no lingering smells, I will 110% be back here again.
Great spot, clean. Friendly and nice place to stay

Most disturbing place I’ve been to the cabin is dirty and stinks, full of permanent people was so full on stayed a whole 3 hours and left wasted my money but rather that than get sick and put up with the smell and permanents all night don’t go waste your money at this place
Stayed there in our caravan, toilets cleaned regularly which was nice. Even though we were on freeway route we rarely heard traffic overnight.

Was a great clean place friendly staff n grounds keeper close enough to all amenities even tho you feel like your in an oasis 🫶 thanks guys for a lovely stay 👌💯 only downfall don't let the machines in the rec hall take your money I lost $10 and grandkids  didn't get to play the games 😣
Great location
Excellent caravan, with big sites. There's some road noise, but it calls Highway one, because it's next to the highway.
It's a big park, quite full but still quiet. We were in the new half, so the facilities were quite new and clean.
Great location to get to multiple areas. Quiet considering it's between two major roads. The pools are nice and they have a good rec room too.
一个非常干净的房车营地

Old  place needs a renovation things was just old wear and tear example the shower door didn't closed fully so water was spilling out when showering, the taps handle as about to come off and the bed side table drawer had missing bits, all and all ok for a one night stay.

Propre, spacieux
Personnel accueillant
En revanche il y a une route à côté qui est bruyante avec les camions...
We stay there often. Staff are very friendly. Pools are lovely. Recreation room is very clean. Highly recommend

It is disgusting that the wifi is non existent. When I contacted the park they knew there was a dead zone at the cottage I stayed in. Yet failed to mention this when booking. When I raised this with them I was told to go to the other end of the park. We have had 2 days without power in 40 degree heat.

These power outages the park manager knew about. The dead zones should have had boosters to fix this.

Cooking is limited to 2 pots and 1 pan. The pots are so small that they would only hold 1 cup of water.

White ants are eating the supports on the balcony and this is not new damage.

Don't stay in Cottage 3

The permanent sites ara a mess and make the place look trashy.

Find a better place as this is not a good place.
The room was dirty. The walls were covered in dirt. Each step I took the whole cabin moved. And for the first 12+ hours after check in the cabin didn't have power 6pm until 12pm.

Easy to get to location, big Park with great amenities. After miss reading the after hours check in process (my fault) and then arriving late, the after hours manager couldn't of been more helpful or understanding with getting us checked in. Room was a good size and week appointed, park was quiet and relaxing. An easy drive into Adelaide City Centre ( about 30 mins)
Amazing for a first time visitors,  very homely as my dad had plenty of room for a walker, toilet/bathroom is world class for everyone, especially disability or elderly. Highly recommended 👌
We have stayed here for 28 days and we have loved it. Staff are amazing, facilities clean, pool is awesome and apart from the traffic noise this is a quiet park. We will be back 😊
Great caravan park,easy drive thru sites.
Very good
Great meeting your residence staying there. Everyone is so nice

Great caravan park, including a newer part with a swimming pool.
Excellent facilities.
In the older section there is also a pool in a lovely tropical setting.

Just spent 8 lovely nights here and would recommend to anyone.
Drive through site with ample area to park car.
Amenities clean.
Pool looked very inviting.
Has a really good recreational area.
Laundry facilities well maintained 3 washers $5 & 2 dryers. Dryers are the best I've used in ages $5 gives you 50mins and both times I had them 3/4 full and everything was dry first time.
Staff friendly and very helpful.
Shops in close proximity for supplies.
Servo with a great selection of food and coffee.
Also ideal for day trips pretty much anywhere around the area & it is only 40 mins for Central Adelaide.
Thanks for the lovely spot.
Very clean, cosy, comfortable, tranquil and very happy and friendly staff
Our cabin was excellent. It was next to the "tropical rain forest" with the pool in the middle.
The pillows here are not comfortable at all i got neck pain and they also give you a wifi limit of not even that much only like 319 mb which is like 2 minutes  and its super slow

I’ve been here multiple times but this particular stay was very disappointing, Our room had a horrible seafood smell, Only a few channels worked on the tv (No smart tv’s), Room was dirty with mark & dents on the wall, stained bed sheets & lino. Staff are friendly and were prompt at coming to fix our hot water. Not sure if ill be returning which is unfortunate as i used to love this place
Lovely quiet park. Clean and comfy cabins and cottages. Friendly, helpful staff. Use of the park laundromat was very convenient.

Great place to spend a few days. Close to city, friendly wonderful staff, huge thanks to Nicole, couldn't do enough for me. 3rd time we have stayed there , quiet, amenities brilliant, camp kitchen. Definatly recommend it.

While being temporarily homeless, we stayed here one night. Best place I've been to North of the city. I wish I could live there!!!!!!! We stayed in a self-contained villa, 2 bedrooms, a bathroom, and an ensuite. The kitchen was well stocked with everything you needed to cook up a storm, and the lounge area was comfortable with a smart TV. Guess there was one slight thing... the WiFi signal was very weak and not able to be used. It may have just been the room, not sure, but it made the tv not so smart. Overall, it would be my first choice if I needed to stay anywhere near there.

Room was very comfortable. The only comment is that the bunk beds are really not suitable for any adults..
Mattress thickness more suited to children.  Other than that it was clean and comfortable. Ample parking and the bathroom was great. Shower pressure great.

Have stayed here twice now. And the same as the first time back in January. The park is quiet until the road crew workers who stay in the cabins come home (same ones again as in January). They talk loudly, have their phone conversations on hands free so the whole park can hear. They swear like troopers and abuse you when you ask them to keep the volume down. The night manager did speak to them as she heard the loudness and swearing as well. Apart from that the park is great. There are a lot of permanents in the blue section as well now seems the red section (permanents) is full.
Staff is great and the park is always clean and tidy.
Showers are clean, hot and water pressure is good.
The sites are drive thru on gravel rocks.
Just what was needed, easy to find, close to where I was going, friendly helpful staff.
Was very clean and everything you need in the pet friendly cottage.Would recomend staying there.
Great park just needs exit signs to get out easy to get lost.

The place was amazing, clean, and very well located. Although we will enjoy more our stay if it was a way to set movies on the TV or have more channels on the share lounge, we will comeback 😀  the ampol outside has food and everything we really enjoyed our stay.

I stayed here some time ago and am coming back to Adelaide again looking at my accommodation options with my 2 small dogs.....(Spoodles) i paid $600 for 2 nights a hefty deposit on a dog friendly cabin of $160.....it was close to $600 in a basic cabin.I left the cabin very clean swept mopped before I left I can tell you my dogs did not soil anywhere and don't shed hair. I did not receive my deposit back for the dog deposit. Dissapointed. Review your pricing Highway 1 it is extremely expensive for what i received. Hoping people read this and look around for better parks at a lot cheaper pricing than this business. It was not in season was November.
Toilets and showers are clean and modern. Good security,well priced and convenient location.
Great park, staff are friendly, have had a few brown snakes but they are onto it quickly, facilities are fantastic. Would recommend a shade sale over the pool

Has everything anyone could ever want or need in a caravan park. friendly staff great location, clean and very modern. best park has to offer someone staying in adelaide thank you for my stay I will be back when I'm in Adelaide

Good service
Good meals.
Absolute beautiful park, clean cabins an friendly staff

We stayed here for two nights with 4 kids all under the age of 3. Porta cots we're supplied free of charge we used x2 for our Twins, even linen and blankets were supplied for them. Service was fantastic, parking right near our villa. Everything was clean, swimming pool came in handy for the warmer weather. Affordable and not too over priced. Swimming pool and playground either side of the park. Recreational room also.
Thank-you will be staying again. Best deals on trivago.

Stayed in own van. Beautiful park.
Ruby and Lenny
Had fantastic holiday activities for kids over the Xmas and New Years period and they catered for big and small children.  My girls favourite was the wildlife
Lovely park, unfortunately husband had a heart attack,  staff were very kind and helpful,  we look forward to staying here again, when we are able to start travelling again.

I wanted to thank the Manager for allowing me to cancel my reservation due to personal reasons!

I be am looking forward to re-booking and having some relaxing time at the park 👍

Staying in a powered site with our caravan. Well, set out bays,no reversing required. Wide roadways. Amenities block need more regular cleaning in the busy times. Mirrors dirty and feminine containers need replacing. Good showers and roomy cubicles. Pool and camp kitchen adequate for use if required. Very central for our needs and freeway into town convenient. We will continue to book here for the ease of parking and location. However the only downside is the smell from Boliver treatment works. Some days you don't notice but there can be a few smelly days. But this is unavoidable due to the location of the park.

On Sunday thex14th of January 2024 I was booked to stay in a Bungalow at Highway 1 Holiday & Lifestyle Park by my Employer. I was driving a 57 seat Coach. Staff were very helpful in allowing me to park the Coach next to their workshops. The Bungalow was beautifully presented, very clean and the Bed and Pillows are top shelf. I could happily live there. I wish there was more accomodation like this between Perth and Melbourne. Thank you Management and Staff.

People who own it are wonderful. It’s just unfortunately the last 2 times I’ve stayed there in the cabins I’ve gotten lice.

Quite concerning.
Stayed only one night as we were heading home from tassie. Nothing too memorable about the place
Great location.  Beautifully presented park with class and quality amenities
Very large park, beautifully manicured gardens, sites are spacious and amenities modern and immaculate. 2 swimming pools and playgrounds for kids. Friendly staff and well managed. Highly recommend
Nice and big caravan park but missing good activities and commonwealth places to share other than a small pool and a shade
Such a beautiful caravan park

I love living here, and it's starting to improve on maintenance since the new manager has been employed. He is very approachable, and his door is always open. I have seen him walking around the park and talking to the residents and seeing what needs to be done. Also the staff in the office are much happier.
Lovely place.  Shops not to far away as well

I own a cabin, which i bought 3 yrs ago.
I still have to pay site fees, which are very cheap, plus electricity and gas, but my water is free, and i don't have to pay council rates either plus everything is secure

My Sis & I stayed on 2 separate occasions on our journey to and from Uluru our cabins we stayed in were comfortable 'however our first cabin the heating/ air conditioning thingy stuck in the wall sounded as bad as it looked 🙉 😆 on the upside 'extra blankets👍🏻 plenty of hot water and great pressure 🚿  good bed's, handy to top ⛽ up before you journey on and fantastic customer service

On our way back our stay was even better a cosy cabin nestled amongst the palm's 🌴 with a working heat pump 😆 huh' even the car got a room/carport for the night, nice quiet & very comfy, great water pressure, plenty of hot water, very happy with the cabin👍🏻we were late getting in so we had to pick-up our keys from the garage "handy this garage ⛽️
They refuse to rent out spots to victims of domestic abuse. Apparently it's too much of a risk to help people in need, even when those people are willing to pay.
Comfortable three star cabin

Used to be quite lovely. Lost our booking even though we had paid. Used to enjoy walking around the gardens. Has really been let go. Not really a tourist park these days more permanents which is a sign of the times.
Perfect caravan park it is clean friendly and the staff are helpful and family friendly
A beautifully kept Caravan and Tourist Park would recommend it to my friends and tourist's
Loved our weekend in a cabin, roomy, clean a real enjoyable stay.....we have also been living in a caravan here friendly staff and never any issues when needing assistance
Always a great stay here, lovely staff and greatly priced rooms

Rooms good value could do with a revamp but still great value. Service makes up for it all. All staff super friendly and had a great giggle with Nicole when booking in. Thx for the stay. Was a nice break to repack our van on our trip caravanning from wa.

Great place, lovely and quiet, the bays are easy to drive into with plenty of space.
could do with an enclosed dog area

We booked on line through a 3rd party so we got the wrong room on arrival but the staff where great changed our room. The room was clean, great space, had everything we needed. So close to all sorts of food stores petrol stations. We had a great time will recommend and we will be back thanks again highway 1
Good value. Very well presented. Staff were fantastic and helpful.
Loved this place villa's were great, clean and well serviced. Needs an oven in the kitchenet.
Great place to stay, nice clean rooms and convenient location, helpful staff.

Beautiful peaceful park, massive sites, all gravel so no mud/grass getting in the van, the staff were more than accommodating, we have been all around Australia and this was one of our favourite parks! Would definitely recommend :)
Don't show up at 4.55pm very rude staff

We have stayed at this park many times before but since it has been taken over by new owners they have let the parks high stands go down hill. The cabin we we in was old and smelt really bad to the point we had to put little pill cups of bicarb soda and niloder around. The floors were gritty and when I swept it there was a big pile of dirt. The bathroom was ok.
Plus side is there were plenty of hot water and great water pressure.
